summary: Footage of ICE Director Todd Lyons speaking at a podium during the VOICE office reopening event, thanking victims' families by name and describing the public safety mission, with families standing behind him. It is a captioned speech clip with no music track. On-screen text reads 'TODD LYONS ICE DIRECTOR', 'TOLL-FREE VOICE HOTLINE: 855-48-VOICE (855-488-6423)', and 'VICTIMS OF IMMIGRATION CRIME ENGAGEMENT 1-855-48-VOICE'.
notable_text: TODD LYONS ICE DIRECTOR; TOLL-FREE VOICE HOTLINE: 855-48-VOICE (855-488-6423); VICTIMS OF IMMIGRATION CRIME ENGAGEMENT 1-855-48-VOICE
